title: Carpal tunnel syndrome - NHS
text:
es (median nerve).
You're more at risk of CTS if you:
are overweight are pregnant do work or hobbies that mean you repeatedly bend your wrist or grip hard, such as using vibrating tools have certain other conditions, such as arthritis or diabetes have a parent, brother or sister with CTS have previously injured your wrist

Next review due: 17 April 2027
